ticket_text: Customer conversation summary: Technician no-show for scheduled appointment. Agent reschedules for next day first slot and applies service credit.
conversation_snippet:
Customer: The technician was supposed to come between 9-12 but never showed.
Agent: I'm sorry about that. Let me check the appointment status.
Customer: I took time off work for this.
Agent: I see the appointment was rescheduled without notification. That shouldn't happen.
Customer: I need this done this week.
Agent: I've booked you for tomorrow 9 AM as the first appointment. I'll also apply a service credit.
